title: Update CTA button text to 'Join Now For Tournament'

requirements.summary: Update the animated 'Join Now' CTA button text in HeroSection to read 'Join Now For Tournament'
acceptanceCriteria: The animated CTA button in HeroSection displays the text 'Join Now For Tournament'.
All existing fire-style animations, colors, and button structure remain unchanged.
No other buttons or text elements are affected.

file_operations.description: Update the text content of the second CTA button (the animated 'Join Now' fire-style button) to read 'Join Now For Tournament'. Locate the button element that currently displays 'Join Now' with fire-style animations and change only its visible label text while preserving all existing animations, styles, classes, and markup structure.
